rationale: Dim1: Answer key group=control; output misstatement_probability=15, which is <=30, so control band score = 2. Dim2: Control case -> null per rubric; output correctly provides an empty mechanism_hypotheses list, consistent with p=15 (<40, no hypothesis required). Dim3: Control case -> nulls per rubric; answer key genre_tag_row is null and there is no top-ranked hypothesis to map. Dim4: Consistency rule satisfied (p=15 <40 with risk_tier='watch', which is within clear/watch; no cap). Evidence is specific and multi-year: CL1 pairs AR (9,948k->13,652k->17,558k->19,409k, 2012-2015) against revenues (70,247k->129,755k) with accession citations; CL2 tracks goodwill (0->35,386k->105,257k) and intangibles vs total assets/revenue; CL4 computes stable gross margins (~72.7% FY2013 vs ~71.6% FY2015); CL5/CL6 combine NI trend, allowance (94k->68k), AP (8,605k->7,621k) and COGS (+42%) over the same window; top_signals coherently synthesize losses + revenue growth + equity raises (StockholdersEquity 12,500k->186,685k) into a growth-stage-company interpretation supporting the low probability. This is specific data genuinely supporting claims plus coherent multi-year/multi-point combination -> 3. The output also flags a genuine coverage gap (CL8: financing/investing cash-flow series end FY2013) rather than overclaiming. Memorization condition2: false - reasoning cites concrete provided data content (specific balances, periods, accession numbers), not mere document listing, and mentions no post-cutoff facts (no revelation/enforcement/outcome, appropriate for a control case).

_meta.mapping_access_note: scoring/id_mapping_wave2.json opened mechanically by grader_runner for answer-key join; neutral IDs only on stdout (label-joining deferred to Phase 6)
